title: Gravitee Security Domain
description: Represents a security domain in the Gravitee Access Management platform that defines authentication and authorization boundaries for applications and users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the security domain.

enabled.description: Whether the domain is currently active and processing requests.

path.description: Context path for the domain used in URL routing.

scim.description: SCIM protocol configuration for user provisioning.

inherited.description: Whether settings are inherited from the organization level.

forgotPasswordEnabled.description: Whether the forgot password feature is enabled.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the domain was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the domain was last updated.
